meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-30 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c1d: −10 vs yesterday · a short, late night
en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A short night — 6h05 (score 79) after a 23:57 bedtime, the latest lights-out of the week. Deep 1h07, light 4h03, REM only 0h55, and zero recorded wake time, so the sleep you got was unbroken — there just wasn't enough of it, and REM took the hit. The autonomic side is still in good shape: HRV held at 48 (−2 vs yesterday's 50 but +7 above the 7-day baseline of 41), RHR sits at 53 (one above the week's low) and morning stress is a low 13. So this is solid recovery on the markers, with sleep duration and the late bedtime the only real limiter — yesterday's full 8h07 left you with a buffer to spend. Today's plan is a hack squat: you're cleared for it, but with a short night behind you keep the warm-up generous and the top sets at controlled RPE rather than chasing a PR. The bigger lever is tonight — get to bed an hour earlier and the REM rebuilds itself.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Kratka noć — 6h05 (ocjena 79) nakon lijeganja u 23:57, najkasnije u tjednu. Duboki 1h07, lagani 4h03, REM samo 0h55, uz nula zabilježene budnosti, pa je san bio neprekinut — samo ga je bilo premalo, a REM je najviše stradao. Autonomna strana je i dalje dobra: HRV se zadržao na 48 (−2 vs jučerašnjih 50, ali +7 iznad 7-dnevne osnovice 41), RHR je 53 (jedan iznad tjednog minimuma), a jutarnji stres nizak 13. Dakle, solidan oporavak po pokazateljima, uz trajanje sna i kasno lijeganje kao jedino pravo ograničenje — jučerašnjih punih 8h07 ostavilo ti je rezervu. Današnji plan je hack squat: spreman si za njega, ali uz kratku noć produži zagrijavanje i drži vršne serije pod kontroliranim RPE-om umjesto lova na rekord. Veća poluga je večeras — lezi sat ranije i REM se sam obnovi.
